'''√d-v-zh''' ('''kadavazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cud|cud]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cud|cud]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √d-v-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kadavazh
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thidavazh || jidavazh || shidavazh || kidavazh
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthudavazh || jujudavazh || shushudavazh || kukudavazh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thudavazh || judavazh || shudavazh || kudavazh
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thudavazh || judavazh || shudavazh || kudavazh
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thedavazh || jedavazh || shedavazh || kedavazh
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothodavazh || jojodavazh || shoshodavazh || kokodavazh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thodavazh || jodavazh || shodavazh || kodavazh
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thodavazh || jodavazh || shodavazh || kodavazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || davazh || davazh || davazh || davazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || davazh || davazh || davazh || davazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || davazh || davazh || davazh || davazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || davazh || davazh || davazh || davazh
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thædavazh || jædavazh || shædavazh || kædavazh
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathadavazh || jajadavazh || shashadavazh || kakadavazh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thadavazh || jadavazh || shadavazh || kadavazh
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thadavazh || jadavazh || shadavazh || kadavazh
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shadavazh
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshadavazh
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishadavazh
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shadavazhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshadavazhnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishadavazhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shadavazhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshadavazhnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishadavazhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shadavazhro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshadavazhnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishadavazhro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shadavazhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshadavazhnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishadavazhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shadavazhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshadavazhnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishadavazhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shadavazhng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshadavazhnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishadavazhng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shadavazhya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshadavazhnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishadavazhya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shadavazhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshadavazhnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishadavazhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shadavazhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshadavazhnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishadavazhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shadavazhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadavazhnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadavazhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shadavazhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshadavazhnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadavazhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shadavazhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshadavazhnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishadavazhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shadavazhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadavazhnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadavazhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shadavazhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshadavazhnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadavazhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shadavazhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshadavazhnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishadavazhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shadavazhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshadavazhnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishadavazhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shadavazhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshadavazhnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadavazhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shadavazhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshadavazhnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishadavazhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shadavazhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshadavazhnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishadavazhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shadavazhmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadavazhnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadavazhmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
